mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qp_snapshot_token_dict ( snapshot_id, source_rule_id, word, nature, frequency, biz_id, enabled, created_at ) SELECT #{snapshotId}, id, word, nature, frequency, biz_id, enabled, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM qp_rule_token_dict WHERE resource_set_id = #{resourceSetId}

INSERT INTO qp_rule_token_dict ( resource_set_id, word, nature, frequency, biz_id, enabled, created_at, updated_at ) SELECT #{resourceSetId}, word, nature, frequency, biz_id, enabled, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM qp_snapshot_token_dict WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId}
